channel.title: Technotes on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in Technotes on SoundsBrown
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Github
item.description: Clone: git clone https://github.com/soundsbrown/brownnote.git Remember credentials: git config credential.helper store Add files: git add file1 file2 file3 See local changes: git diff –cached Commit changes: git commit -a -m “Message” Push changes: git push

item.title: Hugo
item.description: References https://gohugo.io/getting-started/quick-start/ https://therealmjp.github.io/posts/hello-hugo/ https://gohugo.io/hosting-and-deployment/hosting-on-github/ Site setup Install the EXTENDED VERSION to enable customization of the Hermit theme! Commands: hugo new site soundsbrown cd soundsbrown git init git submodule add https://github.com/Track3/hermit.git themes/hermit echo theme = “hermit” >> config.toml hugo new posts\hello.md hugo hugo server -D Some settings need to be copied from themes/hermit/exampleSite/config.toml to your own config.toml

item.title: RC filters and PWM
item.description: References: - http://sim.okawa-denshi.jp/en/PWMtool.php - https://playground.arduino.cc/Code/PwmFrequency/ - https://www.arduino.cc/en/Tutorial/SecretsOfArduinoPWM PWM base frequency: - Pins 5 and 6: 62500 Hz - Pins 3, 9, 10, and 11 is 31250 Hz - Prescaler defaults to 64, resulting in default PWM rates of approximately 976 Hz and 488 Hz - Changing the prescaler allows higher PWM rates, but may affect the behavior of micros(), delay(), et al. This was not a problem when tested on pin 9, though.
